messages.content: My Windows 11 laptop periodically drops Wi‑Fi after waking from sleep. Other devices stay connected. Router: TP-Link Archer AX55 on latest firmware. Laptop adapter: Intel AX201. Event Viewer shows “WLAN Extensibility Module has stopped” errors. I’ve rebooted and power-cycled already. What should I try next?
Given these symptoms, the first things to check are
